  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AuthenticationFilter
    Servlet filter responsible for handling authentication and access control across the entire web application.
    Cart
    Represents a shopping cart item linking a user to a laptop product.
    cartDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Cart-related database operations.
    cartDaoImpl
    Implementation class for the cartDao interface.
    CartServlet
    Servlet handling shopping cart operations and management.
    CookieUtil
    Utility class for handling HTTP cookie operations.
    DashboardServlet
    Servlet handling the admin dashboard with user and order statistics.
    DatabaseConnection
    Utility class responsible for managing database connectivity.
    HomeServlet
    Servlet handling the home page and featured products display.
    ImageUtil
    Utility class for handling image-related file operations.
    Laptop
    Represents a laptop product entity with detailed specifications, pricing, and metadata.
    LaptopDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Laptop entities.
    LaptopDaoImpl
    Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for managing Laptop entities.
    LoginServlet
    Servlet handling user authentication and login functionality.
    LogoutServlet
    Servlet handling user logout functionality.
    OrderItems
    Represents an individual line item in a customer order.
    OrderItemsDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing OrderItems-related database operations.
    orderItemsDaoImpl
    Implementation class for the OrderItemsDao interface.
    Orders
    Represents a customer order containing one or more laptop products.
    OrdersDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Order-related database operations.
    OrdersDaoImpl
    Implementation class for the OrdersDao interface.
    OrderServlet
    Servlet handling order display, management, and retrieval.
    PasswordUtil
    Utility class for handling password security operations.
    ProductsServlet
    Servlet handling laptop product management and display.
    ProductViewServlet
    Servlet handling the display of individual laptop product details.
    Rating
    Represents a user rating and review for a laptop product with associated metadata.
    RatingDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing Rating-related database operations.
    RatingDaoImpl
    Implementation class for the RatingDao interface.
    RatingReviewServlet
    Servlet handling the retrieval and calculation of product ratings and reviews.
    RegisterServlet
    Servlet handling user account registration and validation.
    Role
    Enumeration representing user roles in the system.
    SessionUtil
    Utility class for managing HTTP session operations.
    User
    Represents a user account with authentication credentials, role information, and account metadata.
    UserDao
    Data Access Object (DAO) interface for managing User-related database operations.
    UserDaoImpl
    Implementation of the UserDao interface.
    ValidationUtil
    Utility class for validating user input data.
